steps.title: Confirm the broader trend
steps.content: The first sentence says Indonesia's urbanization increase reflected a trend throughout Southeast Asia. The second sentence gives regional data showing the overall Southeast Asian urban population percentage also rose.

steps.title: Use a confirming transition
steps.content: Choice A would signal correction, Choice B would signal a later time, and Choice C would signal contrast. The second sentence confirms the claim in the first. The answer is D.
